name: Set up StarTrack Shipping
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shipping label and manifests for this carrier requires the "}, {"text": "Neto Commerce Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on. If you have not activated this paid add-on in your control panel, navigate to the add-on store and select install on the "}, {"text": "Neto Commerce Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on tile."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up StarTrack Shipping"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto by Maropost partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Add New Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Set Up Shipping Carrier Based Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and in the pop-up box click "}, {"text": "I Have This Info, Continue Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "StarTrack", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Carrier Account Name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "StarTrack API account number"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "StarTrack API key"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "StarTrack API password"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pickup address details"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter your:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which services you want to offer. Click "}, {"text": "Show All Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " to see a full list. Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping services and give them a description. This information will be visible to customers on your website. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping options should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers And Staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). You can also configure if delivery to PO Boxes is available. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To set different options for each service, click the "}, {"text": "Apply Visibility And PO Box Delivery Settings For Selected Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " box."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now add a "}, {"text": "Discount Incentive", "bold": true}, {"text": " when a customer orders a certain amount. These are optional, set them if you wish and then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which type of printer you will use to print shipping labels, and click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review your settings. You can still make any changes by going back to the relevant section. If you\u2019re happy with the configuration, select "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup"}]}, {"text": " form and Maropost staff will configure your labels as a free service."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For all carrier shipping options we also recommend "}, {"text": "setting backup rates"}, {"text": " in case the carrier\u2019s API suffers an outage."}]}]
